title: Plan and maintain plant displays
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and maintain plant displays demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for plant displays

pcs.text: Confirm display plan requirements with supervisor or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm display plan requirements with supervisor or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm display plan requirements with supervisor or manager.

pcs.text: Inspect the display site for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect the display site for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect the display site for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify location and projected life of display
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location and projected life of display?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location and projected life of display.

pcs.text: Check site irrigation system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check site irrigation system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check site irrigation system.

pcs.text: Identify plant types suitable for aesthetic effects, environmental and physical attributes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant types suitable for aesthetic effects, environmental and physical attributes.

pcs.text: Identify actions, timelines and organise work, in consultation with supervisor or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify actions, timelines and organise work, in consultation with supervisor or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify actions, timelines and organise work, in consultation with supervisor or manager.

pcs.text: Confirm the availability of plants, materials and services for preparing display
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the availability of plants, materials and services for preparing display?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the availability of plants, materials and services for preparing display.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to the display plan and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to the display plan and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to the display plan and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record display requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record display requirements.
